channel.title: Kite on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Kite on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Speedeet & Wilar — De Kite and de Corentyne River
item.description: Is Easter Monday on de seawall. Speedeet and Wilar build a kite from scratch, argue about aerodynamics, nearly take out an auntie roti, and lose de kite to Suriname. A perfect day.

item.title: Speedeet & Wilar — The Easter Kite
item.description: Speedeet and Wilar try to fly a kite on Easter Monday on the seawall. The kite has other plans. A Pike Street Easter adventure.
